evals.prompt: I want to test changing our pricing page CTA from 'Start Free Trial' to 'Try It Free — No Credit Card Required'. Our current click rate is 3.2% and we get 8,000 page visits per month.
evals.expected_output: Should write a hypothesis statement for this test. Should calculate the sample size needed to detect a 20% relative improvement (from 3.2% to ~3.8%). Should calculate test duration based on 8,000 visits/month. Should define primary metric (CTA click rate), secondary metrics, and guardrail metrics. Should produce a test design document.
